NEXT.name: NEXT
NEXT._desc: Pinky only, flick right — scroll / next

EDIT.name: EDIT
EDIT._desc: Thumb + Middle only, hold any position — edit / change gesture

OCR_PAUSE.name: OCR_PAUSE
OCR_PAUSE._desc: Thumb + Ring + Pinky, hold tilt backward — pause / resume reading

OCR_FWD.name: OCR_FWD
OCR_FWD._desc: Thumb only, flick right — skip forward

OCR_BWD.name: OCR_BWD
OCR_BWD._desc: Thumb only, flick left — skip backward / rewind
